founder.description: Allocation to founder for project creation, vision, and ongoing leadership

operations.description: Allocation to operational expenses with room for growth as the platform scales

civic.description: Allocation to civic initiatives, public good projects, and community engagement

research_and_development.description: Allocation to R&D for cryptographic improvements and protocol enhancements

notes: This revenue distribution model balances founder compensation, operational sustainability, civic responsibility, and continuous innovation. The operations allocation is designed with room for growth as the platform scales. All percentages are subject to review based on business needs and market conditions.
